name: phobiablocker
description: Browser extension to block phobia triggering content

scripts.dev:chrome: npm run downloadModels && vite build --watch --mode chrome
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run downloadModels && vite build --watch --mode firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run downloadModels && vite build --mode chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run downloadModels && vite build --mode firefox
